---
title: "g6R, deconstructed"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, css/demos.css]
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    margin: 0
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/animejs/3.2.2/anime.min.js"></script>
    include-after-body:
      - js/infra.html
      - js/g6-deconstructed.html
---

## {.g6d-slide}

::: {.g6d-stage-wrap}
<div id="g6d-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .g6d-frag id="g6d-lay"}
[]{.fragment .g6d-frag id="g6d-explode"}
[]{.fragment .g6d-frag id="g6d-focus-data"}
[]{.fragment .g6d-frag id="g6d-focus-layout"}
[]{.fragment .g6d-frag id="g6d-focus-options"}
[]{.fragment .g6d-frag id="g6d-focus-behaviors"}
[]{.fragment .g6d-frag id="g6d-focus-plugins"}
[]{.fragment .g6d-frag id="g6d-collapse"}
[]{.fragment .g6d-frag id="g6d-unrotate"}
